chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Made Permissible and Prohibited in Marriage

text: : قُلْتُ لَهُ مَا تَقُولُ فِي رَجُلٍ اِدَّعَى أَنَّهُ خَطَبَ اِمْرَأَةً إِلَى نَفْسِهَا وَ مَازَحَ فَزَوَّجَتْهُ مِنْ نَفْسِهَا وَ هِيَ مَازِحَةٌ فَسُئِلَتِ اَلْمَرْأَةُ عَنْ ذَلِكَ فَقَالَتْ نَعَمْ قَالَ "لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ" قُلْتُ فَيَحِلُّ لِلرَّجُلِ أَنْ يَتَزَوَّجَهَا قَالَ "نَعَمْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4486 - Al-Bazanti narrated from Al-Mashriqi, who said:
I asked Abu Al-Hasan (as): What do you say about a man who claimed that he proposed to a woman, and jokingly, she married herself to him while also joking? Then the woman was asked about this, and she said: "Yes."
Imam (as) said: "It is nothing."
I asked: Is it permissible for the man to marry her?
Imam (as) said: "Yes."
